title: Reply with exactly: reviewer OK
summary_text: 1. Add **one new block** in [test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh) for `pid missing + tmux alive`. - Setup: claim `running`, clear `run_driver_pid`, force stale `updated_at_epoch=0`, write compact with `tmux_session`, make fake `tmux has-session` return success. - Assert: `.released == 0`, `.archived_files == 0`, claim remains active (`claim_active=true`), compact/workspace receipt still exist. 2. Add **one new block** for `pid missing + compact fresh`. - Setup: claim `running`, clear `run_driver_pid`, force stale claim epoch, but set compact `updated_at` to “now” (or within `ttl`). - Assert: `.released == 0`, `.archived_files == 0`, run not in `.archived_runs`, compact/workspace receipt still exist. 3. Keep existing stale-positive block as the control (`pid missing + stale claim + stale compact` should still release/archive). - This gives minimal 3-scenario regression coverage with 2 new edge-case blocks + existing baseline.
